description: An alert indicates a user account is logging in from two different countries simultaneously. An incident responder must contain the compromised account.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the 'impossible travel' alert and verify the two login locations.

expected_outcome.expected: Responder confirms the anomalous login activity.

nodes.task_description: Immediately force a password reset for the user's account.

expected_outcome.expected: Responder successfully resets the password, locking the attacker out.

nodes.task_description: Terminate all active sessions for the user account to ensure the attacker is fully disconnected.

expected_outcome.expected: Responder successfully terminates all sessions associated with the compromised account.
